rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Petition

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAY SMITH TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Admission Pro Hac Vice Of Plaintiffs' Out-Of-State Counsel Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Matter continued to 10/23/06 at 11:00 a.m. to correct the following: (1) The Application must be verified by Applicant (CRC 983(b)). The Application may be verified using the procedure set forth in Local Rule 14.26.B. (2) The verification must be in the form set forth in CCP Sec. 2015.5(b). (3) The Application must include all allegations of CRC 983(b)(5), including disclosure of all applications within the last two years to appear in California pro hac vice, the date of each application and whether it was granted. (4) CRC 983(b) requires that a notice of hearing be served. No such document was filed. Service of the Application and the Notice of Motion was insufficient because not date, time and location of hearing was included.
